hero.subtitle: Welcome to the Most Beautiful Villa Retreat in Fethiye
hero.title: VILLA BIROL
hero.description: An unforgettable holiday experience in the tranquil atmosphere of Çalış, Fethiye — with a private pool and breathtaking views.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: A Perfect Escape in the Serene Paradise of the Aegean
about.p1: Intertwined with the unique nature of Fethiye and located just 1.5 km from the magnificent Çalış Beach, our villa (also known as Villa Umberto) is designed for you to build unforgettable memories with your family and loved ones. With 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms, it offers comfortable accommodation for up to 8 guests.
about.p2: You can cool off in our large, sheltered private pool that receives sun all day, and enjoy a barbecue under the stars in the evening. Our villa is extremely close to the world-famous sunset views of Çalış, local markets, and the vibrant center of Fethiye, yet completely isolated from the noise of the city.
about.p3: With its modern architecture, fully equipped elegant kitchen, and peaceful lush garden, this is not just an ordinary holiday home; it is a true paradise of relaxation where you will feel a sense of belonging. A dream-like vacation awaits you, waking up to the sounds of birds and sipping your coffee accompanied by the cool breeze of the Aegean.
about.permit_text: This villa holds a touristic rental residence permit from the Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Culture and Tourism.

items.title: Private Swimming Pool
items.desc: Cool off in our spacious and well-maintained private pool, enjoying every moment of your vacation.

items.title: Fully Equipped Kitchen
items.desc: Prepare your own meals with complete kitchen equipment and experience the comfort of the villa.

items.title: Close to Çalış Beach
items.desc: Just 1.5 km from the famous Çalış Beach — easily reachable by bicycle or local shuttles.

items.title: Private Parking
items.desc: With our enclosed and secure private parking, your vehicle is in safe hands throughout your vacation.

items.title: Licensed Tourist Rental
items.desc: A secure villa with an official touristic rental permit approved by the T.R. Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
